data.title: Whale bets on BTC hitting $200K by year-end; $115K liquidity grabbed. Longs liquidated below $115K.

data.title: Southside Bancshares, Inc. reports Q2 2025 net income of $21.8 million, a 11.6% decrease from last year. Earnings per share down 11.1%.
data.description: In Tyler, Texas, on July 25, 2025, Southside Bancshares, Inc. (NYSE: SBSI) released its financial results for the quarter ending June 30, 2025. The company reported a net income of $21.8 million for this period, showcasing a decrease of $2.9 million (11.6%) in comparison to the same timeframe in 2024 when the net income stood at $24.7 million. Earnings per diluted common share also dropped by $0.09 (11.1%) to $0.72 for the quarter ending June 30, 2025, down from $0.81 in 2024. The annualized return on average shareholders’ equity for this quarter was 10.73%, a decline from 12.46% in 2024. Additionally, the annualized return on average assets for the quarter stood at 1.07%, slightly lower than the 1.19% recorded in the same period in 2024.

data.title: Delta opens Smart Manufacturing Innovation Center in Taiwan, investing $10 million, to accelerate AI-based manufacturing globally.
data.description: A new platform has been established in Taiwan with the aim of advancing AI-based manufacturing globally through equipment validation and talent training. Delta, renowned for power management and smart green solutions, launched the Smart Manufacturing initiative in Taiwan on July 25, 2025. This platform serves as a one-stop hub for accelerating advancements in manufacturing, leveraging on Delta's expertise to support the industry. It is set to enhance efficiency and innovation, contributing to the evolution of manufacturing practices around the world.

data.title: RaySearch to showcase innovations at AAPM 2025 in D.C., focusing on coding energy to end cancer. Key date: July 27-30.
data.description: On July 25, 2025, in Stockholm, RaySearch Laboratories AB (publ) revealed its involvement in AAPM in Washington, D.C. from July 27 to July 30. The event will showcase cutting-edge advancements as part of the worldwide initiative, Coding Energy to End Cancer. Visitors will have the opportunity to engage with the latest innovations aimed at revolutionizing cancer treatment during the event.

data.title: Bitcoin OG from Satoshi era moves $1.1B to exchanges, totaling $9.6B. Analysts predict minimal market impact.
data.description: Based on research conducted by experts in blockchain technology, the sale totaling $9.6 billion is projected to be assimilated by cryptocurrency markets with minimal impact on the overall market.
